category_sources: source_facts.description says Non-validating CSS1 and HTML parser for C++; official SourceForge page describes a simple non-validating HTML parser library for C++.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is htmlcxx; official SourceForge and project homepage use htmlcxx.
docs_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge README are the best official documentation surfaces found.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the htmlcxx source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SourceForge summary identify a C++ HTML/CSS parser library; source_facts.executable lists htmlcxx CLI.
